positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of interconnected constellations and celestial bodies. The main subject is a central, glowing nebula formed by interwoven lines of gold and iridescent sapphire. Surrounding the nebula are minimalist, geometric silhouettes of planets, comets, and abstract astrological symbols, drawn with clean, sharp vector lines. The style is modern cosmic geometry, resembling Art Deco celestial maps mixed with bioluminescence. Composition is perfectly centered and balanced, designed to be viewed as a textile print. Use high contrast contrast between the deep, midnight navy background and the glowing, ethereal metallic foreground elements. Soft, internal glow lighting, ultra-detailed, clean edges, vector illustration aesthetic.
negative: low resolution, grainy, blurry, smudged, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logos, trademarks, messy, abstract scribble, poor composition, multiple subjects, asymmetrical
